headline: Palantir AI floor sustaining with structural-change new conduct documentation. Pentagon formally designated Maven AI a long-term program of record (March 2026), deepening structural integration of Palantir into US weapons-targeting infrastructure; May 1 2026 Pentagon AI-cohort agreements with 7 companies including Palantir for classified military operations; Karp manifesto framing AI weapons proliferation as necessary deterrence (April 20 Al Jazeera 'technofascism' coverage); Boston Globe May 6 opinion 'Trump's frightening, self-dealing, AI-driven military-industrial complex.' Floor (composite 0) sustained. New conduct documentation: Maven elevation to permanent program of record is the most consequential structural-integration event of the cycle; Karp manifesto is governance-transparency-relevant primary-source material on autonomous-weapons posture. Recommend confirm with floor-cluster structural-change documentation.
key_evidence: Pentagon March 2026: Maven AI formally designated as long-term program of record — structural-integration deepening.
May 1 2026: Pentagon AI-cohort agreements with 7 companies (Palantir included) for classified military operations.
April 20 2026 Al Jazeera 'technofascism' coverage of Karp manifesto framing AI weapons proliferation as necessary deterrence.
Karp manifesto critics framing: 'lack of accountability for AI-enabled warfare.'
Boston Globe May 6 2026 opinion piece on AI-driven military-industrial complex (counter-party / public-debate signal).

evidence.source: TheOutpost.AI March 2026 — Maven program of record
evidence.finding: Pentagon locks in Palantir AI as core US military system; Maven program-of-record designation.

evidence.source: Al Jazeera April 20 2026 — technofascism / Karp manifesto
evidence.finding: Karp manifesto frames AI weapons proliferation as necessary deterrence; critics charge lack of accountability for AI-enabled warfare.
Public-debate framing of AI-driven military-industrial complex; counter-party signal on accountability gap.

scoring_rationale.EMP: 1 floor sustained. Karp manifesto framing of AI weapons proliferation is sustained absence of empathic regard for affected populations.
scoring_rationale.BND: 1 floor sustained. Maven program-of-record designation deepens structural participation in weapons-targeting infrastructure.
scoring_rationale.ACC: 1 floor sustained. No published model card, system card, or AI safety policy for any deployed military product.
scoring_rationale.INT: 1 floor sustained. Karp manifesto is primary-source confirmation of declared posture on autonomous-weapons proliferation.

structural_change_documentation.event_type: Pentagon program-of-record designation + AI-cohort classified-operations agreements
structural_change_documentation.structural_significance: Maven elevation to permanent program of record converts Palantir from contractor to embedded weapons-targeting infrastructure. May 1 cohort agreements extend integration to classified domain. Karp manifesto provides primary-source declared posture on autonomous-weapons proliferation.
structural_change_documentation.scoring_impact: None on composite (floor sustained). Documented as floor-cluster structural-change record for cross-cycle continuity.

negativeSignals: Maven permanent program of record; Karp AI-weapons-proliferation manifesto; classified-operations cohort participation; no published model/system cards or safety policy; no third-party red-teaming for military products.
positiveSignals: None identified at entity-conduct level. Boston Globe and Al Jazeera coverage represent functional democratic-debate framework operating around Palantir.
sector_context: AI Labs floor cluster. Structural significance: Palantir is the deepest structural-integration case in US Pentagon AI deployment. Cross-reference: xAI/Grok (under-oath distillation admission), DeepSeek (US State Dept distillation warning), OpenAI (Musk v. Altman trial).
open_actions_resolved: Maven program-of-record designation absorbed as structural-integration documentation
Karp manifesto absorbed as INT primary-source
open_actions_carried: Floor exit criteria not in trajectory
Watch: any third-party red-teaming or independent harm-evaluation initiative
